nodes.name: 黄胸短嘴极乐鸟
nodes.summary: 黄胸短嘴极乐鸟（Yellow-breasted satinbird，学名 Loboparadisea sericea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括成熟森林、山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。
nodes.shortSummary: 黄胸短嘴极乐鸟（学名：Loboparadisea sericea），是新几内亚特有的一种鸟类，它们是黄胸短嘴极乐鸟属的单型种。黄胸短嘴极乐鸟的栖息地位于海拔600米至2000米的山地森林，多数是在1200米以上。黄胸短嘴极乐鸟行动隐秘且鲜为人知，相信其缺少大面积的适宜栖息地。它…

links.key: bird-黄胸短嘴极乐鸟-e9d30cfd__distributed_in__loc-新幾內亞島-ed80f179
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the New Guinea highlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-breasted satinbird is endemic to the central mountain ranges of New Guinea, where it occurs patchily from the Weyland Mountains eastward through the central cordillera to the Herzog Range and Wau Valley regions of Papua New Guinea. It inhabits lower montane and mid-montane forest, usually between 625 and 2,000 m elevation, though most records are from above 1,200 m. The species appears to prefer the interior of mature forest rather than forest edges, differing from related satinbirds that are more commonly associated with edge habitats. Although traditionally regarded as rare and poorly known, field surveys have found it locally common in some areas, particularly in montane primary forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Remote sensing analyses have indicated that forest loss across the species' mapped range remained minimal during the three generations prior to 2021, with less than 1% forest loss recorded. Current threats primarily include small-scale logging and mining activities, both of which may contribute to localized ecosystem degradation and habitat conversion within parts of its range
